sql:
SELECT RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Fec_Pro, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Cod_Emp, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Moneda, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Cod_Pro, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Cod_Sub_Pro, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Nemotecnico, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Instrumento, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.VP_Cap_Amort, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.VP_Int_Total, RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Dias_Vcto, (RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.VP_Cap_Amort+RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.VP_Int_Total)/RF_PLI_031_CarteraLCH_MonTotal.VP_Flujo AS Ponderador INTO RF_CarteraLCH_Pond
FROM RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH INNER JOIN RF_PLI_031_CarteraLCH_MonTotal ON (RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Cod_Pro = RF_PLI_031_CarteraLCH_MonTotal.Cod_Pro) AND (RF_PLI_030_CarteraLCH.Moneda = RF_PLI_031_CarteraLCH_MonTotal.Moneda);
